top_signals.title: Billionaire Kazakh Brokerage CEO Gets SEC Enforcement Warning
top_signals.summary: The billionaire CEO of Kazakhstan-based Freedom Holding Corp. has received a so-called Wells Notice from the US Securities and Exchange Commission, a formal warning that the Wall Street regulator may take enforcement action.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Short seller Andrew Left found guilty of securities fraud
top_signals.summary: Case could have significant implications for investors publishing commentary on stocks
